author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

This PR integrates the data format changes prototyped and tested in the EVOLUTION_X branch to the `master` branch for 20_0_X. Following the strategy agreed in ORP 2026-05-05, it is opened already now to allow it to be reviewed such that it could be merged quickly when the master branch moves to 20_0_X.

This PR includes
* move data types stored in files in workflow 34434.0 (plus those in PREMIX data tier) in `io_v1` namespace to allow schema evolution for complex cases that ROOT's schema evolution can not support (e.g. pointed-to container type of edm::Ref being changed)
* reset all class versions to 3 and all input-related read rules are removed (except of data types stored in RAW) 
* two earlier data type evolution attempt that were rejected at the time because they would have broken backwards compatibility
   * https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50682
   * https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50855

For more information please see the ORP 2026-05-05 [presentation](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1683442/#3-discussion-on-cmssw_17-to-20) and the earlier talks linked there.

**This PR is unusual in several ways:**
* It is huge. Reviewing with "hide whitespace" setting is highly recommended.
  * One alternative would be to use the raw diff (add link)
  * Another alternative is to use command line, e.g. after fetching the commit `git show -b b104b18`
  * Another alternative is to look PRs with `evolution` label https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pulls?q=is%3Apr+label%3Aevolution+is%3Aclosed
  * If it would help, I could create smaller PRs against my own CMSSW repository for people to look in smaller chunks
    * Splitting this PR would require substantial effort to disentangle the dependencies such that code-checks would still function (and was therefore not done)
* It breaks backwards compatibility for non-RAW types
* It needs to be tested with https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50953, https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50954, https://github.com/cms-sw/cms-bot/pull/2753
* It will be merged in 20_0_X regardless of the review status unless major flaws come up during the review and they have not been addressed.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2227

#### PR validation:

None beyond the tests in the EVOLUTION_X IBs. Checked on CMSSW_17_0_X_2026-05-18-1100 that cherry-picking https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50953, https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50954, and this PR shows no difference wrt. CMSSW_17_0_EVOLUTION_X branch.
title: [20_0_X] Move stored types in io_v1 namespace, reset class versions to 3
